top_five.rationale: Giving.sg: SG/SEA presence, IPC tax-relief routing, PayNow-native, high direct overlap with Altru positioning.
DBS PayLah! Ang Bao / eAngBao: SG/SEA presence, PayNow-native, high direct overlap with Altru positioning.
Direct PayNow QR to IPC charity: SG/SEA presence, IPC tax-relief routing, PayNow-native, high direct overlap with Altru positioning.
Community Chest (NCSS): SG/SEA presence, IPC tax-relief routing, PayNow-native.

competitors.name: Wishlist.sg
competitors.pricing_range_published: ~5% service fee + payment processing; free to guests
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's local wedding registry for cash gifts, honeymoon funds, and curated physical items
strengths: Integrated with local hotel wedding partners

competitors.name: Honeyfund
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free tier + 2.8% via PayPal or 3.5% credit card; Honeyfund Cash charges ~3.5%
competitors.primary_value_prop: Free honeymoon and cash registry funded by processor fees on guests

competitors.name: Zola
competitors.pricing_range_published: 2.5% fee on cash funds; card processing ~2.9% + $0.30; free for physical items
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-stack wedding platform (site, RSVP, registry, cash funds) with polished UX

competitors.name: MyRegistry
competitors.pricing_range_published: 2.5% + 2.9% processor on cash gifts; free to set up
competitors.primary_value_prop: Universal registry aggregating gifts from any store plus cash funds

competitors.name: Hitched
target_market: UK couples planning weddings (vendor discovery primary)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free to couples; vendors pay listing subscription
competitors.primary_value_prop: UK's largest wedding vendor directory and planning tools

competitors.name: Wedded Wonderland SG
target_market: Aspirational SG/APAC couples browsing luxury weddings
competitors.pricing_range_published: Media/content play; vendor advertising revenue
competitors.primary_value_prop: Luxury wedding inspiration and vendor discovery for APAC

competitors.name: Giving.sg
target_market: SG donors across all demographics giving to IPC charities
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free for donors and charities (run by NVPC, publicly funded); PayNow + card supported
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's national giving platform for IPC charities with automatic 250% tax relief
weaknesses: No couple-branded pages / ang bao framing

competitors.name: Ray of Hope
target_market: SG donors preferring vetted individual beneficiary stories
competitors.pricing_range_published: 0% platform fee — fully absorbed by ROH (IPC status); 100% to beneficiary
competitors.primary_value_prop: Verified, story-led crowdfunding for SG individuals and families, with IPC tax relief
weaknesses: Individual beneficiaries, not couple's chosen charity

competitors.name: Simply Giving
target_market: APAC peer-to-peer fundraisers for verified charities
competitors.pricing_range_published: ~5% platform fee + 3% payment processing (charity-side)
competitors.primary_value_prop: APAC peer-to-peer fundraising platform for charities in SG, HK, MY, TH
strengths: Supports P2P fundraising pages (usable for weddings)

competitors.name: GlobalGiving
target_market: International donors funding vetted NGO projects worldwide
competitors.pricing_range_published: 5% platform fee + ~3% processing; optional tip from donor
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global marketplace of vetted nonprofit projects
weaknesses: No IRAS tax relief for SG donors

competitors.name: BetterGive Singapore
competitors.pricing_range_published: ~3% platform fee; subscription giving model
competitors.primary_value_prop: Recurring and workplace giving to IPC charities

competitors.name: Community Chest (NCSS)
competitors.pricing_range_published: 0% — government-run; all operating costs funded by Tote Board
competitors.primary_value_prop: Government-run umbrella charity with 250% tax relief supporting 80+ social service agencies

competitors.name: GiveBack SG (CFS)
competitors.pricing_range_published: 1-2% admin fee on DAF AUM; minimum contribution typically S$200k
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's community foundation offering donor-advised funds with IPC-grade tax relief

competitors.name: Temasek Trust / stewardship funds
competitors.pricing_range_published: Not retail; structured grants only
competitors.primary_value_prop: Institutional stewardship vehicle for long-term SG philanthropy

competitors.name: DBS PayLah! Ang Bao / eAngBao
target_market: SG bank customers gifting digital ang bao during festivals and weddings
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free P2P PayNow; no charity routing
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital ang bao with customisable covers for instant PayNow transfer

competitors.name: OCBC Digital Ang Bao (Pay Anyone)
target_market: OCBC customers sending digital red packets
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free via PayNow; festive skins
competitors.primary_value_prop: Bank-native digital ang bao with themed covers

competitors.name: UOB TMRW eAngBao
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free; PayNow based
competitors.primary_value_prop: UOB's festive digital ang bao inside TMRW app

competitors.name: GrabPay / ShopeePay red packets
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free P2P; monetised via ecosystem
competitors.primary_value_prop: E-wallet red packets inside super-apps

competitors.name: Bridestory
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free to couples; vendor subscriptions + lead fees
competitors.primary_value_prop: SE Asia's largest wedding vendor marketplace

competitors.name: Blissful Brides
competitors.pricing_range_published: Vendor advertising / fair tickets; free to couples
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG's long-running wedding media + fair brand

competitors.name: OneThreeOneFour
target_market: SG / APAC couples booking photographers and videographers
competitors.pricing_range_published: ~10-15% vendor commission on bookings (vendor-side, not gifting)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Curated wedding photographer / videographer marketplace across Asia

competitors.name: Bridal Club SG
target_market: SG couples seeking vendor bundles / deals
competitors.pricing_range_published: Vendor-side commission / lead fees
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG wedding vendor marketplace focused on bundled deals

competitors.name: JustGiving
competitors.pricing_range_published: 0% platform fee (charity pays card fees ~1.9%); voluntary donor tip
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global leading personal fundraising platform for registered charities

competitors.name: GoFundMe
competitors.pricing_range_published: 0% platform fee on personal causes; 2.9% + $0.30 card; optional tip
competitors.primary_value_prop: World's largest personal crowdfunding platform

competitors.name: Facebook / Meta Fundraisers
target_market: Global Meta users running birthday / event / cause fundraisers
competitors.pricing_range_published: 0% for registered nonprofits (Meta covers processing for US 501c3); N/A for SG IPCs at scale
competitors.primary_value_prop: Social fundraising attached to posts and life events
weaknesses: No tax receipt automation in SG

competitors.name: Direct PayNow QR to IPC charity
target_market: DIY couples printing a charity's PayNow UEN QR on wedding invites
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free (bank PayNow rails); donor claims IRAS tax relief directly with charity receipt
competitors.primary_value_prop: The no-platform option: guests scan the charity's own PayNow and donate directly
weaknesses: Couple can't track who gave / thank guests

competitors.name: Bountie
target_market: SG retail users doing round-up / rewards-linked giving
competitors.pricing_range_published: ~5% platform fee on donations; rewards partners
competitors.primary_value_prop: Micro-giving through rewards and round-ups to SG charities

competitors.name: Whydonate
competitors.pricing_range_published: 0% platform fee; donors pay optional tip + ~2.9% processing
competitors.primary_value_prop: Free crowdfunding for personal and nonprofit causes

competitors.name: GiveNation
competitors.pricing_range_published: ~5% platform fee; partner rewards funded
competitors.primary_value_prop: Rewards-based giving via shopping partnerships

competitors.name: MUIS / Mosque SalamSG
target_market: SG Muslim community giving zakat / sadaqah / wedding-linked alms
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free; operated by statutory body; PayNow accepted
competitors.primary_value_prop: Official Islamic giving channel for SG (zakat, wakaf, mosque building fund)

competitors.name: Hindu Endowments Board (HEB)
target_market: SG Hindu community giving to temples / wedding-linked offerings
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free; statutory board; PayNow and card
competitors.primary_value_prop: Official Hindu temple donation channel for SG
strengths: IPC tax relief via registered temples

competitors.name: City Harvest / Church giving portals
target_market: SG Christian congregants giving tithes / wedding thanksgiving
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free to giver; PayNow + card; church absorbs processing
competitors.primary_value_prop: In-church giving portals tied to specific congregations

competitors.name: The Knot Registry (Cash Funds)
competitors.pricing_range_published: 2.5% cash-fund fee + 2.9% processing
competitors.primary_value_prop: US market-leading wedding site + registry with cash funds and charity option

_categories_legacy.wedding_registry: Gift lists / cash registries where guests contribute toward items, honeymoons, or causes. Few route to IPCs.
_categories_legacy.charity_platform: Public donation portals routing to IPC charities. Generic (not wedding-specific).
_categories_legacy.donor_advised_fund: Structured philanthropic vehicles for pooled / advised giving, usually for HNW or corporate donors.
_categories_legacy.digital_angbao: Bank / wallet features for digital red-packet gifting. Not charitable by default.
_categories_legacy.wedding_vendor_platform: Wedding planning marketplaces (venues, photographers, planners). Do not handle gifting.
_categories_legacy.diy_fundraiser: Personal crowdfunding platforms. Could be repurposed for wedding-to-charity but not IPC tax-relief.
_categories_legacy.recurring_charity_fintech: Round-up / subscription / peer-to-peer charity tech. Not wedding-specific.
_categories_legacy.religious_community: Mosque / temple / church giving channels, often used for wedding-linked tithing.

_methodology_note: Platform fees scraped from public pricing pages where available; IPC status confirmed via Commissioner of Charities (charities.gov.sg) and IRAS IPC listings. Wedding registry fees sourced from Zola, Honeyfund, MyRegistry public pages. Giving platform fees sourced from Giving.sg, Ray of Hope, Simply Giving, GlobalGiving public FAQs. SG wedding vendor platform fees are mostly commission/listing-based and partially disclosed (flagged 'partial' or 'hidden_estimated'). Threat assessed against Altru's wedding-native, IPC-tax-relief, PayNow-first positioning.
